station_address: Petrol Pump, Muranjan Wadi, Marol, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400072
text: Terrible service at this petrol pump! Despite multiple fuel machines being free and several staff members present, only one person was working while others stood around doing nothing. The wait time was unnecessarily long, and to make things worse, the staff behaved rudely when asked for assistance. Very disappointing experience—this place seriously needs better management and customer service!”

station_address: Petrol Pump, Muranjan Wadi, Marol, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400072
text:
Cleanliness is also essential in a petrol pump. The station should be well-maintained and free from litter and debris. Customers are more likely to visit a petrol pump that is clean and well-organized.

Pricing is another significant factor that can affect a customer's decision to visit a particular petrol pump. A good petrol pump should have reasonable pricing and transparent billing practices.

Finally, customer service is also an essential aspect of a petrol pump. The staff should be polite, knowledgeable, and able to provide assistance with refueling or any other queries.

Overall, a good petrol pump should have quality fuel, safety measures, cleanliness, reasonable pricing, and good customer service. These factors can make the refueling experience hassle-free and convenient for customers.

text: Avoid this place. Only fill if you are low on fuel and fill only to reach a better fuel station. During rain avoid completely as water gets mixed in fuel it happened to me twice.

station_address: Petrol Pump, Muranjan Wadi, Marol, Powai, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400072
text:
Nice  place for filling up your Car tanks.
A bit busy place at time, best hours are early morning or night to filling.
Being on the mainroad, it's easy to access.
It also has simple number of station's to fill in.
Do keep a watch on all stations especially 0 before you start filling in and amount to pay by card.
Has a station to fill up air in your vehicle.
Being Bharat Petroleum quality can be ensured.

Overall a good experience
